/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libeasync_core.so -o libeasync_core.so CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/src/driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/src/payload_utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/drivers/ble.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/drivers/mock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/drivers/mqtt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/drivers/wifi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/easync_core.dir/drivers/zigbee.cpp.o  -lpaho-mqttpp3 -lpaho-mqtt3as -lcurl -lpthread
